title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the CLI and REST API for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other open-source LLMs locally with minimal setup.

title: langchain-community/llms-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps the Ollama REST API, allowing LangChain chains and agents to use any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, usable in Node.js and browsers via fetch.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, exposing synchronous and async APIs plus convenient helpers.

title: ollama-npm
summary: NPM distribution of the official ollama-js library, making it one-command installable in Node.js projects.

title: ollama-python PyPI
summary: PyPI distribution of the official ollama-python package, installable via pip.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chat, prompt templates, and code syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Electron-based desktop GUI for Ollama written in TypeScript and React.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama in containers with GPU support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension integrating Ollama as a local code-completion backend, mimicking GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Command-line interface shipped within the ollama/ollama repo for pulling, running, and managing models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Official documentation and examples for using Ollama’s /api/embeddings endpoint with nomic-embed-text and other embedding models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node affinity and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Example repository showing how to build a RAG pipeline using Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets guild members chat with any model served by a self-hosted Ollama instance.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama supporting threaded replies, app mentions, and ephemeral responses.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI wrapper exposing Ollama endpoints with OpenAPI docs and request/response validation.
